title: True Dovah
description: Skyrim inspired textures for Ice and Fire mod
body:
Skyrim inspired textures for Ice and Fire mod.
Changes appearance of all dragons and dragon scales related content to be more detailed and vibrant.

**Requires either original [Ice and Fire](https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-and-fire-dragons) or [Community Edition](https://modrinth.com/mod/iceandfire-ce)**

 Pack was designed to also work with and compliment _[Frostbite & Brimstone](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/frostbiteandbrimstone)_ with matching dragon skeletons and dragon steel armors.

![Pack selection screen when paired with Frostbite & Brimstone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27164a8a5844587ea2c410069e498d5901909f8b.png)
